Homepage.typewriter: A FULL STACK DEVELOPER,A PROBLEM SOLVER,A LOVER OF SIMPLE THINGS

Projects.CHServiciosJuridicos: Landing page showing information about a legal services firm. It incorporates a contact form powered by EmailJS. It also has light/dark mode.
Projects.PetsAmerica: Part of the front-end team, building an e-commerce that offers products and services for pets. With features such as a shopping cart, PayPal integration, a chatbot, and user authentication through Google or email. It also has light/dark mode.
Projects.MyPhotographyPortfolio: Personal portfolio, based on this website, that shows the moments I capture every day. Every photo tells a story, and I'm excited to share the stories I've captured with passion and creativity.

About.title: About Me
About.firstP: Hey there!, I'm Maximiliano Herr, an Argentinian web developer and coffee addict, currently living in Sydney Australia. I'm a creator of unique digital experiences. In my free time, you can find me capturing moments with my camera, or playing video games.
About.secondP: Currently, I specialize in the following technologies, and I'm totally up for exploring more:
